login.title: Webmail

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.connection_failed: Unable to reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.cors_blocked: The server is reachable but is blocking cross-origin requests. Check your JMAP server's CORS settings and allow this domain.
error.server_error: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.generic: An unexpected error occurred. If this persists, contact your administrator.
error.totp_invalid: Invalid authentication code. Please check your authenticator app and try again.
error.oauth_discovery_failed: SSO is enabled but the identity provider could not be reached. Check your OAuth configuration.

config_error.title: Configuration Error
config_error.fetch_failed: Unable to load application configuration. Please try again later.
config_error.server_not_configured: The mail server has not been configured. Please contact your administrator.

login.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

oauth_error.title: Authentication Failed
oauth_error.invalid_state: Security validation failed. Please try signing in again.
oauth_error.missing_params: Missing authorization data. Please try signing in again.
oauth_error.token_exchange_failed: Failed to complete authentication. Please try again.
oauth_error.access_denied: Access was denied. Please contact your administrator.

calendar_invitation.title: Calendar Invitation

calendar_invitation.published_info: This event was shared for reference.
calendar_invitation.response_info: This message contains an attendee response.
calendar_invitation.response_info_organizer: This attendee response updates your event.
calendar_invitation.update_info: This message updates an existing event.
calendar_invitation.counter_info: This message proposes changes to an event.
calendar_invitation.counter_info_organizer: This attendee proposed changes to your event.
calendar_invitation.refresh_info: This message requests the latest event details.
calendar_invitation.refresh_info_organizer: An attendee requested the latest event details.
calendar_invitation.declined_counter_info: The organizer declined a counter proposal.
calendar_invitation.authentication_failed_info: Mail authentication checks for this invitation failed. Treat calendar actions with caution.
calendar_invitation.authentication_missing_info: This invitation does not include verified mail authentication. Confirm the details with the organizer if anything looks unusual.
calendar_invitation.sender_mismatch_info: This invitation was sent from {sender}, while the organizer listed in the calendar data is {organizer}.
calendar_invitation.sender_mismatch_unverified_info: This invitation was sent from {sender}, while the organizer listed in the calendar data is {organizer}, and the message could not be verified.
calendar_invitation.actor_refresh_info: {name} asked for the latest event details.
calendar_invitation.request_info: You've been invited to this event. Respond to let the organizer know your availability.
calendar_invitation.cancel_info: The organizer has cancelled this event.
